title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : candidature et entretien
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions en faisant le lien entre eux.

passages.label: E-mail de candidature
passages.text:
From: Marc Lefevre
To: HR Department
Subject: Application for Marketing Assistant Position

Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Marketing Assistant position posted on your careers page. I have attached my resume and cover letter for your review.

I am currently available for an interview any weekday afternoon, except Wednesdays, as I have a prior commitment. Please let me know if you need any additional documents.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Marc Lefevre

passages.label: Note interne - planning d'entretien
passages.text:
Interview Schedule - Marketing Assistant Position

Candidate: Marc Lefevre
Interview Date: Thursday, May 9th
Time: 2:00 p.m. - 2:45 p.m.
Location: Meeting Room B, 2nd Floor
Interviewers: S. Wallace (Marketing Manager), T. Nguyen (HR Coordinator)

Note: Candidate should bring a portfolio of past marketing projects if available. A short writing test (15 minutes) will be administered before the interview.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of Marc's email?
questions.explanation: Il écrit pour postuler au poste d'assistant marketing : "I am writing to apply for the Marketing Assistant position".

questions.prompt: When is Marc not available for an interview?
questions.explanation: Il précise être disponible "any weekday afternoon, except Wednesdays".

questions.prompt: On what day has the interview been scheduled?
questions.explanation: La note interne indique "Interview Date: Thursday, May 9th", ce qui correspond bien aux disponibilités de Marc (pas un mercredi).

choices: The Marketing Manager and the HR Coordinator
questions.explanation: "Interviewers: S. Wallace (Marketing Manager), T. Nguyen (HR Coordinator)".

questions.prompt: What should Marc bring to the interview, if available?
choices: A portfolio of past marketing projects
questions.explanation: "Candidate should bring a portfolio of past marketing projects if available".
